raw_note: Reviewed for recurrent headaches in keeping w migraine. Neuro exam reassuring today. Start sumatriptan 50mg at onset of migraine, may rpt once after 2 hrs if needed (max 2 tabs in 24 hrs). Can take with ibuprofen if tolerated. Avoid dehydration + try to identify triggers. Arrange routine GP f/u if freq increasing or meds not helping. Urgent assessment needed if sudden worst-ever headache, new weakness/numbness, confusion, seizure or visual loss not settling.
